hardcore_mode.label: Hardcore Mode
hardcore_mode.confirm:
Enable Hardcore Mode?

Your settings will be saved immediately, and all Core RPG settings will be permanently locked at their current values. This cannot be undone.
hardcore_mode.description: Permanently locks all Core RPG settings at their current values.

xp_gain_condition.label: XP Gain Condition
xp_gain_condition.description: Defines what earns the player XP (XP-Based progression only). The automatic options award XP each turn from the action assessment, scaled by difficulty. 'AI Reader decides' defers to the story reader's per-turn judgement; 'Disabled' turns XP off.

xp_per_action.label: Base XP per Action
xp_per_action.description: Base XP granted when the XP gain condition is met, scaled by the action's difficulty (trivial x0.25 up to extreme x2.5).

action_rating_strictness.label: Action Rating Strictness
action_rating_strictness.description: How harshly player actions are judged. Each step is a named difficulty tier: 1 Power Fantasy, 2 Cinematic, 3 Heroic, 4 Favorable, 5 Balanced, 6 Gritty, 7 Demanding, 8 Harsh, 9 Merciless, 10 Brutal (success is almost impossible).

attribute_points_per_level.label: Attribute Points per Level
attribute_points_per_level.description: Attribute points banked on each level-up for the player to spend on stats (XP and Milestone progression only).

skill_points_per_level.label: Skill Points per Level
skill_points_per_level.description: Skill points banked on each level-up. Spend 1 point for +1 rating on an existing skill, or save up to learn a brand-new skill (XP and Milestone progression only).

new_skill_cost.label: New Skill Cost
new_skill_cost.description: Skill points required to learn a brand-new skill from the level-up screen. Rarity (rolled by fate when the skill is chosen) shapes how powerful the skill's design is; every new skill starts at rating 5, except a Mythic, which is born at max rating and immediately qualifies for evolution.

evolution_ai_model.label: Skill Evolution AI
evolution_ai_model.description: Model used to generate skill evolution themes and evolved forms when a skill reaches max rating.

new_skill_ai_model.label: New Skill AI
new_skill_ai_model.description: Model used to generate skill categories, skill suggestions, and the refined description when learning a brand-new skill from the level-up screen.

plot_aware_skill_generation.label: Plot-Aware New Skills
plot_aware_skill_generation.description: When learning a brand-new skill, let the wizard see the Plot Director's active thread so some offered categories and skills could genuinely help against the current challenge (without spoiling it). Turn off for plot-blind skill generation. Has no effect when the Plot Director is disabled or no thread is active.

external_skill_events_enabled.label: External Skill Events
external_skill_events_enabled.description: After each turn, detect skills granted, removed, or altered by external forces acting on the player (divine boons, curses, blessings, magical injuries, a mentor's gift) — separate from the player's own practice/XP progression.

command_help./stats: Show your character's stats and HP
command_help./level: Show your level and XP progress

mutation_schema.hp_change: integer, HP gained or lost by the player in the story. Use 0 if no player HP changed.
mutation_schema.stat_changes: object mapping stat name (power/agility/vitality/intelligence/spirit/charm) to integer change. Empty object if none.
mutation_schema.skill_changes: object mapping skill name to {rating: int, description: str, trigger_words: [str], type: 'active'|'passive'|'curse'}. For new skills, provide rating/description/trigger_words/type. description: 1-2 tight sentences stating what the ability actually does, how it manifests, its source, and any limits/costs/conditions shown in the story — concrete and specific to this story, never generic filler like 'skilled in X'. For existing skills, just rating. Never set a rating above 10; skill tiers are system-managed, do not modify them. Empty object if none.
mutation_schema.xp_gained: integer, experience points the character earned from this action. Use 0 if none. Only consulted when the module's XP Gain Condition is set to 'AI Reader decides'; otherwise XP is awarded automatically from the action assessment.
mutation_schema.status_effects_gained: array of temporary conditions the PLAYER gained in the story: {name: str, description: str, kind: 'good'|'bad', severity: int 1-10, duration_turns: int|null, duration_minutes: int|null}. description is ONE short sentence naming the condition and its cause (e.g. 'Broken leg from the fall.' or 'Brainwashed by the cult leader.') — never longer. severity is how strong/impactful the condition is: 1-2 a minor nuisance, 5-6 a serious hindrance like a broken leg, 8-10 life-altering like deadly poison or full mind control. Injuries, poisons, diseases, mind control, buffs, blessings all count. YOU decide how long each effect lasts: set exactly one duration, in the unit the fiction implies (a stun lasts turns, a poison lasts in-world minutes/hours). If the story doesn't state a length, estimate a plausible one from the condition's nature and severity — being unsure is NOT a reason to omit the duration. Leave both null ONLY when the effect genuinely has no natural expiry: it is permanent until actively cured or dispelled (a curse, a lost limb), or it is continuously sustained by an outside source such as an NPC or the environment (a captor's mind control, freezing while still in the blizzard). The player bears at most 3 concurrent effects — the strongest persist. Empty array if none.
mutation_schema.status_effects_removed: array of status effect names that were cured, healed, dispelled, or otherwise ended in the story. Empty array if none.
